name: Moark

dataResidency.euRegionDetails: Moark states that the company and its servers are located in the People's Republic of China, and that personal information collected and generated within China is stored domestically. The site also markets the platform as "Made in China" and emphasizes domestic compute options; no EU region or EU-only processing option was found in primary-source materials.

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: The privacy policy says data is generally retained only for the shortest time necessary to achieve the stated purposes, except where longer retention is required by applicable laws, court decisions, legal procedures, or government enforcement requests; if the service stops operating, personal information will be deleted or anonymized within a reasonable period.
dataUsage.details: The privacy policy says collected information may be used to provide services, personalize features, communicate with users, improve services, conduct analysis or research, enforce terms, and comply with law. No primary-source statement was found specifically addressing model training on API customer data.

notes: Moark (模力方舟 / Gitee AI) appears to be operated by Shenzhen Aosi Yanguard Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. in China, with primary-source materials indicating servers in the PRC and no published EU-only processing option. A privacy policy is public, but no public DPA/AVV, sub-processor list, SCC commitment, or explicit no-training statement for API data was found in the provider's primary-source materials reviewed.
